metadata.title: Integrate SMS Phone Verification & Password Reset

story.iWant: Epic 2'deki phone verification ve password reset flow'larına gerçek SMS gönderimi (FONIVA)
story.soThat: kullanıcılar SMS OTP alabilsin ve stub implementation kaldırılsın

tasks.task: AuthService'deki stub SmsService'i kaldır ve Epic 5.1'den gerçek SmsService inject et
Register flow'unda phone verification SMS gönder
Forgot password flow'unda password reset SMS gönder
Resend verification OTP flow'unda SMS gönder

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Auth module, SmsService inject ediyor (Epic 5.1'den) - AuthService → SmsService dependency injection, SmsModule import edilmiş AuthModule'e, Epic 2'deki stub SmsService kaldırıldı

Register flow'unda phone verification SMS gönderiliyor - Story 2.2'deki register() method'unda gerçek SMS gönderimi, SmsService.sendSms() çağrılıyor (type: 'OTP'), SMS gönderimi async (non-blocking), SMS send failure → log error, don't block registration, Stub implementation kaldırıldı

Forgot password flow'unda password reset SMS gönderiliyor - Story 2.6'daki forgotPassword() method'unda gerçek SMS gönderimi, SmsService.sendSms() çağrılıyor (type: 'OTP'), SMS gönderimi async (non-blocking), SMS send failure → log error, don't block password reset flow, Stub implementation kaldırıldı

Resend verification OTP flow'unda SMS gönderiliyor - Story 2.7'deki resendVerificationOtp() method'unda gerçek SMS gönderimi, SmsService.sendSms() çağrılıyor (type: 'OTP'), SMS gönderimi async (non-blocking), Stub implementation kaldırıldı
SMS gönderimi async (non-blocking) - Fire-and-forget SMS (async, don't await), SMS send failure → log error, don't block auth flows, All stub implementations kaldırıldı (Epic 2'den)

doc.title: Epic 5 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Story 5.4 integrates Epic 2 authentication flows with Epic 5.1 SMS module. Replaces stub SmsService with real FONIVA integration for phone verification and password reset SMS sending.

doc.title: Epic 5: Communication Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Story 5.4 integrates SMS phone verification and password reset with real FONIVA SMS sending. Replaces Epic 2 stub implementations with production-ready SMS integration.

doc.title: Story 5.1: SMS Module
doc.snippet: SmsService.sendSms(domainID, phoneNumber, message, type) method with database tracking and FONIVA integration. Returns SMS entity with status tracking (PENDING → SENT → DELIVERED/FAILED).

doc.title: Story 2.6: Password Reset Flow
doc.snippet: forgotPassword() method generates OTP and calls stub SmsService.sendOTP(). Story 5.4 replaces stub with real SmsService.sendSms() call.

doc.title: Story 2.7: Phone Verification
doc.snippet: resendVerificationOtp() method generates OTP and calls stub SmsService.sendOTP(). Story 5.4 replaces stub with real SmsService.sendSms() call.

doc.title: Story 2.2: User Registration
doc.snippet: register() method generates OTP and logs to console (stub). Story 5.4 replaces stub log with real SmsService.sendSms() call.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns
doc.snippet: Error handling pattern: Try-catch wraps operations, logs errors to Sentry, doesn't throw exceptions for non-critical failures. SMS sending failures should not block auth flows.

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern for unit tests. Mock dependencies (SmsService) and test async operations. Minimum 70% coverage required.

artifact.reason: Epic 5.1 SmsService with sendSms(domainID, phoneNumber, message, type) method. This is the real service that will replace the stub in Auth module.
SmsModule exports SmsService for use in Auth module. Must be imported into AuthModule.
Epic 2 stub SmsService that logs SMS instead of sending. Must be deleted and replaced with Epic 5.1 SmsService import.
register() method generates OTP and logs to console (stub). Line 118 must be replaced with real SmsService.sendSms() call.
forgotPassword() method calls stub SmsService.sendOTP(). Line 259 must be replaced with real SmsService.sendSms() call.
resendVerificationOtp() method calls stub SmsService.sendOTP(). Line 442 must be replaced with real SmsService.sendSms() call.
AuthModule currently has stub SmsService in providers. Must import SmsModule and remove stub SmsService provider.
OtpService generates OTP codes with purpose isolation. Already integrated, generates OTP before SMS sending.

constraints.constraint: NestJS dependency injection pattern: SmsModule must be imported into AuthModule, SmsService injected into AuthService constructor
Async fire-and-forget pattern: Don't await SmsService.sendSms(), wrap in try-catch, log errors to Sentry, don't throw exceptions
Stub removal: Epic 2 stub SmsService file (src/modules/auth/services/sms.service.ts) must be deleted, stub provider removed from AuthModule

SMS message format: OTP messages must follow template format: "Your verification code is: {code}. Valid for 5 minutes." for phone verification, "Your password reset code is: {code}. Valid for 5 minutes." for password reset
Database tracking: All SMS sends tracked in SMS entity via SmsService.sendSms() (handled internally by Epic 5.1 SmsService)
Error handling: SMS failures logged to Sentry (Epic 7), don't block auth flows (registration, password reset, resend OTP)
Testing: Unit tests mock SmsService, integration tests verify SmsService.sendSms() called with correct parameters, E2E tests verify real SMS delivery
Import organization: Follow 8-group order (Libraries → Services → Interfaces → Enums)

interface.name: SmsService.sendSms
interface.signature: sendSms(domainID: string, phoneNumber: string, message: string, type: SmsType): Promise<SMS>

interface.name: ISmsService
interface.signature: interface ISmsService { sendSms(...): Promise<SMS>; retrySms(...): Promise<SMS>; getStats(...): Promise<Stats>; }

interface.name: SmsType enum
interface.signature: enum SmsType { OTP, NOTIFICATION, MARKETING, ALERT }

tests.standards: Testing follows Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Unit tests mock SmsService and verify method calls. Integration tests verify SmsService.sendSms() called with correct parameters (domainID, phoneNumber, message, type: 'OTP'). E2E tests verify real SMS delivery via FONIVA. Minimum 70% coverage required. Error scenarios tested: SMS send failure logged, doesn't block auth flows.
tests.locations: Unit tests: src/modules/auth/__tests__/auth.service.spec.ts, Integration tests: test/integration/auth-sms.e2e-spec.ts, E2E tests: test/auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts, test/auth-password-reset.e2e-spec.ts

ideas.test: Unit test: AuthModule imports SmsModule, SmsService available in AuthService
Unit test: Stub SmsService removed from AuthModule providers
Unit test: register() calls SmsService.sendSms() with phone verification message
Unit test: register() SMS send error logged, doesn't block registration
Unit test: forgotPassword() calls SmsService.sendSms() with password reset message
Unit test: forgotPassword() SMS send error logged, doesn't block password reset flow
Unit test: resendVerificationOtp() calls SmsService.sendSms() with phone verification message
Unit test: resendVerificationOtp() SMS send error logged, doesn't block flow
Integration test: SMS send failure → Error logged, auth flow continues successfully
E2E test: Register → Verification SMS sent via FONIVA with correct message
E2E test: Forgot password → Password reset SMS sent via FONIVA with correct message
E2E test: Resend verification OTP → SMS sent via FONIVA with correct message
